name: Cherry Tomato Salsa
recipeInstructions:
Coarsely chop tomatoes and mix with the herb blend in a food processor or by hand.
Stir in chopped green onion and lime juice. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the salsa in a small bowl, spooning it onto cucumber slices or tortilla chips. Makes about 2 cups.
HERB BLEND
In a bowl, combine minced garlic, packed fresh cilantro, and seeded jalapeno chilies.
